description: Governance-coverage registry for every specification that steers Datum development. Enforced by scripts/check_spec_governance.py (wired into scripts/run_drift_gates.sh). Every .md file under the enforced globs plus every tracked_doc MUST have an entry here. Classes: 'governed' (tracked in PROGRESS.md and/or locked by a real drift gate), 'doctrine' (ratified decision record; controlling, exempt from a PROGRESS status row), 'pending' (known orphan with a required remediation note), 'historical' (superseded/frozen, exempt with a required reason). See CLAUDE.md -> 'Specification Governance (controlling)'.

specs/STANDARDS_COMPLIANCE_SPEC.md.note: compliance cluster: newly governed; PROGRESS Spec Governance Coverage row. Deeper disposition-reconciliation gate pending.

specs/ERC_SPEC.md.remediation: ERC rules implemented in engine; spec not yet gate-reconciled. Govern alongside the rules/checks tool contract.

specs/SCHEMATIC_CONNECTIVITY_SPEC.md.remediation: Schematic connectivity implemented in engine; spec untracked. Govern alongside the schematic authoring contract.

specs/IMPORT_SPEC.md.remediation: Import converter frozen per North Star. Govern only if import work resumes.

specs/M7_FRONTEND_SPEC.md.reason: M7 review-spike frontend spec; superseded by GUI decisions 014/015 and the North Star. Not an active implementation target.

docs/contracts/LIBRARY_AUTHORING_TOOL_CO.note: gate-enforced; add a PROGRESS pointer in the tool-contract governance pass.

docs/contracts/SCHEMATIC_AUTHORING_TOOL_.note: gate-enforced; add a PROGRESS pointer in the tool-contract governance pass.

docs/contracts/RULES_CHECKS_TOOL_CONTRAC.note: compliance cluster: newly governed; PROGRESS Spec Governance Coverage row.

docs/contracts/PCB_LAYOUT_TOOL_CONTRACT..remediation: PCB layout tool contract; untracked and ungated. Govern in the tool-contract governance pass.

docs/contracts/MANUFACTURING_OUTPUT_TOOL.remediation: Manufacturing/CAM output tool contract; untracked and ungated. Govern in the tool-contract governance pass.

docs/contracts/AI_CLI_MCP_TOOL_SURFACE.m.remediation: AI/CLI/MCP tool-surface contract; runtime MCP surface is gated via MCP_API_SPEC, but this contract doc itself is untracked. Govern in the tool-contract governance pass.

docs/contracts/UI_LAYOUT_SYSTEM_CONTRACT.remediation: UI layout system contract (decision 014); the GUI design-token gate covers VISUAL_LANGUAGE, not this contract. Govern in a GUI governance pass.

docs/decisions/PRODUCT_MECHANICS_010_IND.note: compliance cluster: ratified standards mechanism, now tracked. IPC-7351B basis to be consolidated here from OPEN_QUESTION_RESOLUTIONS.

docs/decisions/PRODUCT_MECHANICS_OPEN_QU.remediation: Ratified resolutions log (e.g. IPC-7351B basis) should be consolidated into numbered decision records (010). Do not add new ratifications here.

docs/IPC_FOOTPRINT_SYSTEM.md.note: compliance cluster: newly governed; PROGRESS Spec Governance Coverage row. IPC-7351B generator + structured basis not yet built.

docs/SYMBOL_LIBRARY_IMPORT_SPEC.md.note: compliance cluster: newly governed; PROGRESS Spec Governance Coverage row.

docs/STANDARDS_COMPLIANCE_INTEGRATION_GU.remediation: Standards-integration guidance; fold into STANDARDS_COMPLIANCE_SPEC or govern in the standards governance pass.

docs/STANDARDS_AUDIT_BATCH_1_GUIDANCE.md.remediation: Standards Audit Batch 1 guidance; referenced by the PROGRESS batch section. Govern, or mark historical once the batch closes.
